title: Trump Says Iran Proposal Isn’t Enough to Stop Attacks on Bridges and Power Plants
summary_full: President Trump has told Iran it must open the Strait of Hormuz by 8 p.m. Tuesday or face the consequences, although he has delayed previous deadlines.
summary_public: President Trump has told Iran it must open the Strait of Hormuz by 8 p.m. Tuesday or face the consequences, although he has delayed previous deadlines.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran Proposal Isn’t Enough to Stop Attacks on Bridges and Power Plants
